title: Fortune vs Silk Touch
description: Easily tell apart Fortune and Silk Touch enchants on your pickaxe!
body:
## Fortune and Silk Touch Visuals

This Pack changes the textures of diamond and netherite pickaxes, dependant on the enchant which is on it.

Useful for Survival, where you can have both enchants in the inventory and still see which is which instantly.

There is no Mod required to work, all Vanilla

 My [Discord](https://discord.gg/eTfBJZKb9v) if you have any questions or suggestions for improvement :D

 Also have a look at my other projects, e.g. Density and Breach Pack which does the same as this pickaxe one but for the mace.
